name: Crumb-Topped Blueberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
If using frozen berries, thaw.
Crumb Topping: In a small bowl, combine 2/3 cup sugar, 1/2 cup flour, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, 4 tablespoons soft butter or margarine, and 1 cup chopped walnuts. Stir until the mixture is evenly blended and crumbly in appearance.
In a large mixing bowl, measure the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Stir well to blend. In a separate measuring cup, combine eggs, milk, butter, and lemon juice. Stir the liquid ingredients into the dry ingredients until blended. Pour this mixture into a buttered 13-by-9-inch baking dish. Sprinkle blueberries evenly over the batter. Sprinkle with the Crumb Topping. Bake at 375 degrees for 40 to 45 minutes. Serve warm.
